scenario_description: Sequential 4-step workflow: create document structure, add content, format headers, add footer.

command:
printf 'Quarterly Business Report

Q1 Performance Summary

Revenue reached 3.2 million, exceeding target by 8%%.
Customer satisfaction improved to 92%%.
Three new partnerships were established.

Q2 Outlook

Focus areas include digital transformation and team expansion.
Expected revenue growth of 15%% over Q1.
' > /home/user/Desktop/quarterly_report.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Add the author name 'Prepared by: Marketing Department' at the very top of the document, before the title.
Now add a new section at the end titled 'Key Risks' with the text: 'Supply chain disruptions remain the primary concern.'
Add the date 'Date: March 2025' right after the author line you added earlier.
Finally, add 'CONFIDENTIAL' at the very end of the document. Save the file.
